title: Article Type: decision
description: Decision articles record an explicit choice, its context, and the alternatives that were rejected. Required body sections: Summary, Current Understanding, History/Changes, Evidence Notes, Open Questions (common skeleton) plus a 'Decision' section listing the chosen option and rationale. Required knowledge_time.valid_from; valid_to may be null (still in force) or set when a superseding decision is recorded via relations.superseded_by.

valid_from.description: The date the decision was made. Required.
